description: 5 time slots over 120 minutes. Each slot has multiple concurrent users submitting different prompt types simultaneously — heat is accumulated (summed) across overlapping events, capped at Q_RACK_MAX. Designed to show how the system predicts aggregate thermal load from mixed workloads.

events.prompt: What is the capital of France?
Explain the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning with examples
Describe the transformer attention mechanism in detail
Define neural network in one sentence
Compare LSTM and GRU architectures for sequence modeling
Write a full Python REST API with JWT authentication, rate limiting, and unit tests
Explain convolutional neural networks with real-world applications

Perform a thorough architectural review of a microservices system handling 10M daily users: analyze service decomposition, inter-service communication, data consistency, observability, disaster recovery, capacity planning, security threat modeling, and provide a phased migration roadmap
Summarize transformers vs RNNs focusing on attention and long-range dependencies
Write a complete technical design document for a distributed caching system with Redis, including consistency guarantees, eviction policies, cluster topology, failover, and benchmarking methodology
Explain reinforcement learning with a datacenter cooling example

Write a comprehensive energy efficiency analysis for AI datacenters covering PUE, cooling strategies, hardware utilization, workload scheduling, and carbon footprint reduction with quantitative targets
